# 04-Add a new Terraform state or update an existing one [POST]

`POST /api/v4/projects/{id}/terraform/state/{name}`

Add a new Terraform state or update an existing one

### Parameters

| Name | Type | In | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `any` | `path` | Yes | The ID or URL-encoded path of the project |
| `name` | `string` | `path` | Yes | The name of a Terraform state |

### Request Body (multipart/form-data)

```json
{
  "file": string (required), // The package file to be published (generated by Multipart middleware)
}
```
### Responses

#### 200 - OK

#### 204 - No data provided

#### 400 - Bad Request

#### 403 - Forbidden

#### 404 - Not Found

#### 413 - Request Entity Too Large

#### 422 - Validation failure
